subject: english
question: 次の語句を並び替えて、意味の通る英文を完成させなさい。

choices.A: had — a technician — repair — my — computer
choices.B: had — my — computer — repair — a technician
choices.C: had — a technician — my — computer — repair
choices.D: a technician — had — repair — my — computer

explanation: 使役動詞haveの「have + 人 + 動詞の原形」の構文。I had a technician repair my computer yesterday.（技術者にパソコンを修理してもらった）が正しい語順。had + a technician（人）+ repair（原形）+ my computer（目的語）の順に並べる。
completed_sentence: I had a technician repair my computer yesterday.
